challenges.title: Create a Sprite Sheet
challenges.description: Combine 4 social media icons (Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn) into a single sprite image and display them using background-position.
hints: Create or use existing icons at the same size
Combine them horizontally in a single image
Use background-position to show each icon
Add hover states that shift the background position

challenges.title: Flag Sprites
challenges.description: Build a country flag selector using a sprite sheet of 6 flags in a 3x2 grid.
hints: Create a grid of flag images in one file
Each flag cell must be the same size
Add a hover effect that highlights the flag

challenges.title: Animated Sprite
challenges.description: Create a CSS animation that cycles through sprite frames to create a simple animation effect.
hints: Each keyframe shows a different sprite position
